explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: Vertex Pharmaceuticals references a disciplined approach to enterprise AI. This approach describes regulatory and ethical guardrails in their development of AI for clinical trial Informed Consent Forms.
governance.path_to_improvement: Name an AI governance body with defined mandate covering all AI use.

relevant_sources.summary: This award recognition for Vertex Pharmaceuticals provides evidence for **governance**, **oversight**, and **transparency**. The source highlights Vertex's disciplined approach to enterprise AI, emphasizing regulatory and ethical guardrails in their development of AI for clinical trial Informed Consent Forms. Specifically, it notes rigorous testing, feedback iteration, and the crucial role of human-in-the-loop reviews, demonstrating operational AI practices and transparency in system mechanics.
relevant_sources.title: Best Use of Data and AI for Healthcare Award – Vertex Pharmaceuticals

summary.overall_findings: Vertex Pharmaceuticals references a disciplined approach to enterprise AI, as documented in its published materials. These materials also describe regulatory guardrails in Vertex Pharmaceuticals' development of AI for clinical trial Informed Consent Forms, addressing 3 of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars. Transparency, oversight, and governance are each addressed at the policy level, drawing from 13 publicly available sources. No qualifying public evidence was found for fairness, explainability, and 2 additional pillars.
